title: Luxury Home Cinematic Tour
prompt: Smooth dolly shot through modern luxury home entrance, camera glides through grand foyer with double-height ceiling, natural sunlight streaming through floor-to-ceiling windows creating dramatic shadows. Steadicam movement transitions seamlessly from living room with contemporary furniture to gourmet kitchen with marble countertops. Golden hour lighting bathes interior spaces in warm glow, highlighting architectural details like crown molding and custom millwork. Camera performs elegant crane shot ascending spiral staircase, revealing open floor plan from above. Subtle lens flares and depth of field changes emphasize spatial relationships

scene_elements.subject: Modern luxury residential property interior
scene_elements.environment: High-end home with designer furnishings and architectural features
scene_elements.motion: Smooth tracking shots, gentle pans, ascending crane movements
scene_elements.style: Cinematic real estate videography with shallow depth of field
scene_elements.lighting: Natural golden hour light mixed with ambient interior lighting

variations.adjustments: Bright morning light, coffee brewing in kitchen, newspapers on counter
Warm interior lights, fireplace glowing, city lights visible through windows
Children's artwork displayed, family photos, warm lived-in feeling

best_practices: Maintain consistent camera height at eye level, use subtle speed ramping for transitions, ensure all rooms are well-lit before filming, stage each space with fresh flowers and designer accessories

title: Commercial Office Space Showcase
prompt: Dynamic aerial establishing shot of modern glass office building at sunrise, drone descends smoothly to ground level entering through automatic glass doors. Interior gimbal shots showcase open-plan workspace with exposed ceiling, industrial design elements, and collaborative areas. Camera tracks laterally through rows of ergonomic workstations with natural light flooding through windows. Subtle time-lapse elements show the space transforming throughout the day. Conference rooms feature state-of-the-art technology displays. Rooftop terrace sequence with city skyline backdrop, camera orbits around outdoor seating areas

scene_elements.subject: Modern commercial office building and workspace
scene_elements.environment: Corporate environment with contemporary design elements
scene_elements.motion: Aerial descents, lateral tracking, orbital movements
scene_elements.style: Professional corporate videography with clean aesthetics
scene_elements.lighting: Natural daylight with supplementary LED panels for consistency

variations.adjustments: Neon accents, gaming areas, casual dress code visible, creative wall art
Dark wood furnishings, leather chairs, formal meeting rooms, library
Diverse work areas, coffee bar, phone booths, community bulletin boards

best_practices: Capture during optimal daylight hours, ensure all screens display relevant content, remove confidential information from whiteboards, use ND filters for consistent exposure

title: Virtual Staging Transformation
prompt: Split-screen presentation showing empty room transforming into fully furnished space through smooth morphing transition. Camera locked on tripod, consistent framing as furniture materializes: contemporary sofa fades in, coffee table appears with decorative elements, area rug unfolds beneath. Wall art frames materialize and paintings fade into view. Lighting gradually warms as virtual lamps and fixtures appear. Kitchen counters populate with staged accessories, dining table sets itself with place settings. Bedroom transforms from bare to luxuriously appointed with bedding, nightstands, and window treatments

scene_elements.subject: Empty rooms transformed through virtual staging
scene_elements.motion: Static camera with animated furniture appearances
scene_elements.lighting: Consistent base lighting with enhanced virtual lighting elements

variations.adjustments: Scandinavian furniture, neutral colors, minimal decorations
Classic furniture pieces, rich fabrics, ornate accessories
Multi-functional furniture, space-saving designs, mirrors for depth

best_practices: Maintain identical camera position for before/after, ensure consistent color grading, use subtle particle effects for magical transformation feel

title: Neighborhood Lifestyle Montage
prompt: Energetic montage showcasing neighborhood amenities and lifestyle, beginning with sunrise time-lapse over residential streets. Drone footage reveals tree-lined streets transitioning to vibrant local coffee shop with patrons. Quick cuts to farmers market with fresh produce, children playing in community park, joggers on walking trails. Camera captures local restaurants with outdoor dining, boutique shopping district with pedestrians. School buildings shown during arrival time, community center with activities. Sunset sequence at neighborhood gathering spot, street lights illuminating safe walkable streets

scene_elements.subject: Neighborhood community and local amenities
scene_elements.motion: Dynamic cuts, aerial sweeps, handheld movement
scene_elements.lighting: Natural lighting throughout different times of day

variations.adjustments: Focus on schools, playgrounds, family activities, safety features
Transit options, co-working spaces, nightlife, fitness centers
Medical facilities, quiet streets, community centers, accessibility

best_practices: Obtain proper permissions for filming in public spaces, capture diverse demographics, show seasonal variety when possible

title: Construction Progress Time-lapse
prompt: Multi-angle construction site documentation from foundation to completion, hyperlapse showing excavation equipment breaking ground, concrete pour for foundation in accelerated time. Tower crane assembly sequence with workers in safety gear. Steel frame rising floor by floor, glass curtain wall installation progressing systematically. Interior rough-in phase with electrical and plumbing, drywall installation sweep. Final touches with landscaping trucks arriving, parking lot striping, signage installation. Culminates with ribbon cutting ceremony transitioning from construction site to finished building

scene_elements.subject: Construction project from start to finish
scene_elements.environment: Active construction site evolving to completed structure

variations.adjustments: Focus on individual homes, community features, family move-ins
Heavy machinery focus, engineering details, public benefit emphasis
Historic preservation elements, before/after comparisons, craftsmanship

best_practices: Secure fixed camera positions for consistency, protect equipment from weather, maintain same exposure settings, include date/time stamps

title: Interior Design Portfolio Reel
prompt: Sophisticated showcase of interior design projects with match-cut transitions between spaces. Opening with designer's hands sketching, transitioning to 3D render, then revealing finished room. Macro shots of texture details: fabric swatches, wood grains, metal finishes. Pull-focus technique highlighting statement pieces, custom millwork, bespoke furniture. 360-degree room reveals showing cohesive design themes. Color story progression through complementary spaces. Behind-scenes glimpses of installation process. Closing with satisfied clients enjoying transformed spaces

technical_specs.color_space: Display P3 for rich color reproduction

scene_elements.subject: High-end interior design projects and details
scene_elements.motion: Smooth reveals, focus pulls, detail shots
scene_elements.lighting: Carefully controlled mixed lighting for accurate color

variations.adjustments: Eco-friendly materials, natural elements, energy-efficient features
Period details, craftsman techniques, before/after reveals
Clever storage solutions, multi-functional elements, space illusions

best_practices: Use color-calibrated monitors, capture RAW when possible, maintain consistent white balance, highlight unique design elements

title: Aerial Estate Exploration
prompt: Cinematic drone footage beginning with high altitude establishing shot of estate grounds, slow descent revealing manicured gardens, swimming pool, tennis courts. Orbit around main residence showcasing architectural grandeur from all angles. Low altitude flight through tree-lined driveway approaching mansion entrance. Rising crane shot along facade revealing multiple stories, architectural details. Sunset timing creates dramatic shadows across landscape. Smooth transitions between wide establishing shots and intimate architectural details. Final pull-away shot revealing entire property within surrounding landscape

scene_elements.subject: Luxury estate property and grounds
scene_elements.environment: Expansive private property with multiple amenities
scene_elements.motion: Aerial movements: orbits, reveals, crane shots

variations.adjustments: Include boat dock, water approaches, sunset reflections
Dramatic elevation changes, vista views, winding access roads
Vineyards, horse facilities, working farm elements

best_practices: Check airspace regulations, fly during low wind conditions, use ND filters for proper exposure, maintain visual line of sight

title: Day to Night Transition Showcase
prompt: Seamless transition from bright daylight to evening ambiance captured from identical camera positions. Beginning with morning light streaming through windows, subtle time-lapse shows shadows moving across rooms. Kitchen transforms from breakfast scene to dinner preparation with warm pendant lighting. Living room shifts from natural light reading nook to cozy evening gathering with fireplace glow. Exterior shots show landscape lighting activating, pool lights creating azure glow. City skyline visible through windows transforms from day to sparkling night view. Interior lighting showcases architectural features dramatically

scene_elements.subject: Property showcasing 24-hour livability
scene_elements.environment: Residential or commercial space through time
scene_elements.motion: Locked camera positions with time-lapse elements

variations.adjustments: Breakfast service to romantic dinner ambiance
Daytime shopping to evening window displays
Workday functionality to after-hours entertainment

best_practices: Use manual exposure settings, plan lighting cues carefully, ensure smooth ramping between exposures, color grade for seamless transitions

title: Virtual Reality Property Tour
prompt: Immersive 360-degree capture designed for VR headset viewing, starting in entrance foyer with full spherical view. Natural head-height perspective moving through spaces at walking pace. Interactive hotspots highlighted with subtle visual cues for additional information. Smooth locomotion between rooms avoiding motion sickness triggers. Spatial audio capturing room acoustics, HVAC systems, outdoor sounds. Multiple viewing paths allowing user choice in exploration direction. Detailed texture capture for close inspection of finishes. Optimal lighting for depth perception in VR environment

scene_elements.subject: Complete property interior and exterior
scene_elements.lighting: Even, natural lighting avoiding extreme contrasts

variations.adjustments: Narration track, predetermined path, highlighted features
User-controlled navigation, interactive measurements, note-taking
Toggle between staged and empty rooms for visualization

best_practices: Maintain consistent height, avoid rapid movements, ensure adequate lighting in all directions, test on multiple VR platforms

title: Renovation Before & After Story
prompt: Dramatic reveal sequence showing complete property transformation through carefully matched shots. Opening with distressed original state: peeling paint, dated fixtures, cramped layout. Transition effects using animated blueprints, construction dust particles dissolving to reveal renovated space. Split-screen comparisons with sliding wipe transitions. Detail shots of restored architectural elements, modern updates. Time-lapse segments of key construction phases. Emotional storyline following space from neglected to cherished. Final walk-through showcasing seamless blend of preserved character with modern amenities

variations.adjustments: Focus on restored period details, craftsmanship, authenticity
Emphasis on technology integration, open concept, efficiency
Industrial to residential conversion, creative repurposing

best_practices: Document extensively before demolition, maintain exact camera positions, use consistent focal lengths, color match before/after footage carefully
